summary: This is a very brief product announcement post where Joel Spolsky celebrates the launch of FogBUGZ for Unix and Macintosh platforms. The post captures the excitement of shipping a new product with minimal fanfare. It links to the product page and system requirements for all three supported platforms. The closing quip about it being Monday suggests the frenetic energy of a launch day.
key_points: FogBUGZ expanded from Windows-only to Unix and Macintosh platforms
Joel expresses genuine excitement about the act of shipping products
The brief, energetic tone reflects the intensity of launch day
money_quotes: There's nothing better than shipping a new product.
key_insight: For Joel, the act of shipping a product to customers is the most satisfying moment in software development.
